guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Never guess how to repair malformed managed markers in user-authored files.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Preflight requires exactly one ordered marker pair and runs before any target write.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Remote integrity checks must fail closed when explicitly requested.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Archive mismatch and missing hash tooling return failure before extraction.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Installed managed content must be structurally valid inside an existing Markdown document.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Dedicated template has no front matter or level-one heading; install smoke test verifies structure.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Security and guard documentation must describe enforcement timing precisely.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: README and reference docs say checks detect diffs and block finish/archive/merge gates, not writes.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not hand-edit generated cockpit status.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Status was generated by lifecycle commands.

risk.detail: User-content preservation, archive verification, installed structure, and documentation drift are regression tested.

observedIssues: No new release or trusted checksum asset can be published from this local Work Item.

residualRisks.detail: SHA256 is only meaningful when the expected digest is obtained through an independent trusted channel; signatures and provenance attestations are not provided.
The documented current fixed release remains v0.4.4 until a new release containing these changes is published.

reviewReadiness.reason: All repository-side fixes are implemented and tested; publishing a new signed/checksummed release remains external work.

userCorrectionSolidification: Documentation check now rejects mutable installer URLs and missing --update-makefile flags.

checkpointEvidence.detail: Installer preservation, supply-chain, documentation, and localization scope reviewed.
Full tests, installation smoke test, documentation audit, and residual release risks reviewed.

knownGaps: No new release tag, checksum asset, signature, or provenance attestation was published.
Framework-specific build and guard configuration remains required.
overclaimPrevention: Claims distinguish fixed-version selection from optional archive integrity checking and from cryptographic provenance.
